## Meeting Purpose

[Strategy Sprint Standup to discuss ongoing projects, client updates, and upcoming kickoffs.](https://fathom.video/share/VbxSsmeBuGy7XbyfNWr55ehKTLLLvsvF?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New client kickoffs (Sentinel-1, Diligent, Okta) upcoming; each with unique content refresh/creation needs](https://fathom.video/share/VbxSsmeBuGy7XbyfNWr55ehKTLLLvsvF?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [Multiple projects (Metronome, Monograph, Airbyte) progressing with content generation and workflow improvements](https://fathom.video/share/VbxSsmeBuGy7XbyfNWr55ehKTLLLvsvF?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
  - [Handoffs and transitions occurring for Biologica, Enjin, and potentially Augment Code projects](https://fathom.video/share/VbxSsmeBuGy7XbyfNWr55ehKTLLLvsvF?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [Need to clarify deliverables and expectations for newer clients (e.g., Hypergrowth, Town)](https://fathom.video/share/VbxSsmeBuGy7XbyfNWr55ehKTLLLvsvF?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)

## Topics

### New Client Kickoffs

  - [Sentinel-1 & Diligent: Content refresh opportunities, addressing organic traffic downturn](https://fathom.video/share/VbxSsmeBuGy7XbyfNWr55ehKTLLLvsvF?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [Okta (Auth0): Custom workflows for outbound growth, unique deal due to existing relationship](https://fathom.video/share/VbxSsmeBuGy7XbyfNWr55ehKTLLLvsvF?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [Initial artifacts set up in Notion, to be updated post-kickoffs](https://fathom.video/share/VbxSsmeBuGy7XbyfNWr55ehKTLLLvsvF?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)

### Ongoing Project Updates

  - [Metronome: White paper strategy shared, awaiting approval; goal to generate approved content this week](https://fathom.video/share/VbxSsmeBuGy7XbyfNWr55ehKTLLLvsvF?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [Monograph: Reviewing artifacts; exploring AROPS setup request (need to clarify scope and strategic implications)](https://fathom.video/share/VbxSsmeBuGy7XbyfNWr55ehKTLLLvsvF?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Airbyte: Refresh workflow facing technical issues; SEMrush blogs (100) ready for generation once bug is fixed](https://fathom.video/share/VbxSsmeBuGy7XbyfNWr55ehKTLLLvsvF?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
  - [Interwild: New content structure deliverables on track; 250 ketamine pieces nearly ready for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/VbxSsmeBuGy7XbyfNWr55ehKTLLLvsvF?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
  - [Biologica: Handoff in progress; Atlas workflow updated for medical claim tagging; website launch in September](https://fathom.video/share/VbxSsmeBuGy7XbyfNWr55ehKTLLLvsvF?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
  - [Hypergrowth: Blog and social post generation from podcast transcript; need to clarify publication strategy](https://fathom.video/share/VbxSsmeBuGy7XbyfNWr55ehKTLLLvsvF?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Enjin: 9 articles in production; new pipelines for each vertical set up in Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/VbxSsmeBuGy7XbyfNWr55ehKTLLLvsvF?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
  - [Town: 4 new blogs planned; need to set up Looker dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/VbxSsmeBuGy7XbyfNWr55ehKTLLLvsvF?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)

### Project Transitions and Contracts

  - [Augment Code: In week 7, likely to extend; 4 new blogs reviewed, 1 ready for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/VbxSsmeBuGy7XbyfNWr55ehKTLLLvsvF?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
  - [Contract sent on Friday, awaiting response; ROI calculator being prepared for CEO discussion](https://fathom.video/share/VbxSsmeBuGy7XbyfNWr55ehKTLLLvsvF?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)

### Workflow and Process Improvements

  - [Airbyte: Customizing workflow, adding fact-checker for statistics](https://fathom.video/share/VbxSsmeBuGy7XbyfNWr55ehKTLLLvsvF?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Monograph: Exploring AROPS setup, considering strategic implications of sharing backend processes](https://fathom.video/share/VbxSsmeBuGy7XbyfNWr55ehKTLLLvsvF?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Biologica: Atlas workflow updated to automate medical claim tagging](https://fathom.video/share/VbxSsmeBuGy7XbyfNWr55ehKTLLLvsvF?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Deliver new content structure for Interwild by end of day tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/VbxSsmeBuGy7XbyfNWr55ehKTLLLvsvF?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
  - [Clarify Hypergrowth's publication strategy and deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/VbxSsmeBuGy7XbyfNWr55ehKTLLLvsvF?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Set up Looker dashboard for Town](https://fathom.video/share/VbxSsmeBuGy7XbyfNWr55ehKTLLLvsvF?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [Start publishing content for Augment Code this week, pending approvals](https://fathom.video/share/VbxSsmeBuGy7XbyfNWr55ehKTLLLvsvF?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
